violations.text: The hand-washing sinks are lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand-washing sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
A pail was observed in the hand-washing sink in the 3 bay sink area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Food observed stored in a toilet room. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are stored on a cluttered and unclean sideboard of the 3 bay sink. Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location, where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The area with the 3 bay sink, and one toilet room have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2024
